speaker: speaker2
text: I am great ! How about you , Mary ? How are you ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I am doing great ! Thank you for asking , Joe .

speaker: speaker2
text: I was wondering if you want to go see a movie with me tonight ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I need to stay home tonight and finish my term paper .

speaker: speaker2
text: OK . What about going to the movies on Friday night ?

speaker: speaker1
text: What were you planning on seeing ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I was thinking about seeing that one about the rapist serial killer .

speaker: speaker1
text: How about “ The Secret Life of Bees ” ?
